# ~~testing/utility/mcp-response.utility~~

> **Test Support Layer**

Parsers for MCP protocol response payloads: `tools/list`,
`tools/call`, health, and SSE.

## Deprecated

All exports in this module are deprecated.  The
Effect-TS migration moved response formatting into each service’s
`executeFormatted` method, and E2E tests now validate through the
MCP client transport rather than raw JSON-RPC parsing.  Will be
removed in a future cleanup pass.

## Remarks

Every function uses [getObjectProperty](../reflect.utility/functions/getObjectProperty.md) and
[getStringProperty](../reflect.utility/functions/getStringProperty.md) from `reflect.utility.ts` for safe
property traversal on `unknown` payloads.

| Export                                                      | Payload type          |
| ----------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------- |
| [getTextContent](functions/getTextContent.md)               | MCP `content` array   |
| [parseToolsListPayload](functions/parseToolsListPayload.md) | `tools/list` JSON-RPC |
| [parseToolCallText](functions/parseToolCallText.md)         | `tools/call` JSON-RPC |
| [parseHealthStatus](functions/parseHealthStatus.md)         | `/health` response    |
| [parseSseResponse](functions/parseSseResponse.md)           | SSE `data:` frame     |

## Functions

| Function                                                        | Description                                                                      |
| --------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [~~getTextContent~~](functions/getTextContent.md)               | Extracts the first `"text"` value from an MCP `content` array.                   |
| [~~parseToolsListPayload~~](functions/parseToolsListPayload.md) | Parses a `tools/list` JSON-RPC response and returns the tool names.              |
| [~~parseToolCallText~~](functions/parseToolCallText.md)         | Extracts the text content from a `tools/call` JSON-RPC response.                 |
| [~~parseHealthStatus~~](functions/parseHealthStatus.md)         | Extracts the `status` string from a health endpoint response.                    |
| [~~parseSseResponse~~](functions/parseSseResponse.md)           | Parses an SSE response by extracting the first `data:` line and JSON-parsing it. |
